category_sources: Official homepage is for dhex and distributes the project source archive.
source_facts.description says it is an ncurses based advanced hex editor with diff mode.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official DHEX project page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was present in source_facts.repo.
source_facts.source-archive is an official project tarball URL, not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies hex editor, diff mode, and ncurses UI.
